name: lab3-api-testing-postman
description: Laboratory work 3: Complex REST API testing with Postman and Newman

scripts.report: newman run postman/Lab3_JSONPlaceholder.postman_collection.json -e postman/Lab3_JSONPlaceholder.postman_environment.json -d data/posts_data.json -r cli,htmlextra,json --reporter-htmlextra-export reports/newman-report.html --reporter-json-export reports/newman-report.json
